title: hanguanaceae
intro: The hanguanaceae rank refers to a family of flowering plants. It is a taxonomic rank that groups together closely related genera, typically sharing similar characteristics and evolutionary relationships. The hanguanaceae family is a relatively small group of plants, comprising a limited number of species. Research and classification of the hanguanaceae family are ongoing, with some sources recognizing it as a valid family, while others consider it a synonym or part of a larger family.
